content: We can reframe human reflective practice as the active learning component of human long-horizon autobiographical memory, mirroring how 2024-2025 cutting-edge active learning agent memory systems rely on iterative self-directed retrieval and re-encoding to retain only high-value information for long tasks. Just as active learning agents selectively query for new information and prune low-relevance memory entries to avoid context overflow, intentional human reflection acts as an endogenous active learning loop that curates personal memory to improve future decision-making.
